description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a large, L-shaped green lawn surrounding it on three sides. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with several windows and doors distributed across the facades. The roof is flat, and the building features a simple, modern design with minimal ornamentation. The interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms and some built-in furniture. There is no visible porch, but the main entrance is clearly defined on one side. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof and an L-shaped green lawn, featuring asymmetrical window placement and a simple, clean design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and the largest expanse of green lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view with fewer windows, a visible back door, and the lawn extending behind the building.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal windows, and the continuation of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a secondary entrance, some windows, and a clear view of the building's depth and lawn layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
